prompts: I'm planning to make a post editor for blog. The contents are based on markdown. If you needs, add library to deal with markdown. Use supabase DB to get data I inserted already.
There are other table like categories and tags
Please find post_category_links. Why don't you find all info in my supabase?
Okay, then you can check my whole tables in supabase.
summary: Implemented a Supabase-backed markdown blog editor with email/password auth, post CRUD, category and tag link editing, linked image metadata display, and GFM markdown preview.

prompts: The Sidebar showing post list can be hide.
summary: Added a persistent header toggle that hides or shows the post list sidebar while preserving the selected post and expanding the editor layout.

prompts: Markdown editor should support more fucntion. Get lib for editor like toast/ui. Recommend like this libs.
summary: Replaced the textarea markdown editor with MDXEditor, added rich markdown toolbar/source-mode features, and wired image uploads to the Supabase `blog-contents` bucket with image metadata insertion.

prompts: The editor is totally broken. It's showing just Icon for tools and I cannot find input UI for content.
summary: Repaired the editor UI by defaulting MDXEditor to source mode, strengthening the visible input surface, and restoring a live markdown preview panel.

prompts: Right side UI move to below the title and slug input UI.
summary: Moved the post metadata controls from the right-side panel to a full-width section directly below the title and slug inputs.
